---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new notebook, project, or resource
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## What would you like to see added?

A clear description of the feature or content you'd like.

## Type

- [ ] New notebook topic
- [ ] New project idea
- [ ] New resource / blog / course link
- [ ] Improvement to existing content
- [ ] Other: ___

## Why is this valuable?

Explain why this would help learners or the quantum computing community.

## Relevant Resources

Links to papers, tutorials, or references that could help implement this.

## Would you like to contribute this?

- [ ] Yes, I'd like to submit a PR for this
- [ ] No, but I'd love to see someone else work on it
